---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Hero Section */
  .hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0c2d6b 0%, #1a56db 50%, #3b82f6 100%);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 5rem 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -50%;
    left: -50%;
    width: 200%;
    height: 200%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 30px 30px;
    animation: drift 20s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes drift {
    from { transform: translate(0, 0); }
    to { transform: translate(30px, 30px); }
  }

  .hero-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 700px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .hero-img {
    width: 160px;
    height: 160px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border: 4px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    animation: heroFadeIn 1s ease-out;
    transition: transform 0.4s ease, box-shadow 0.4s ease;
  }

  .hero-img:hover {
    transform: scale(1.08) rotate(3deg);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }

  .hero h1 {
    font-size: 2.8rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    animation: heroFadeIn 1s ease-out 0.2s both;
  }

  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: #bfdbfe;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    animation: heroFadeIn 1s ease-out 0.4s both;
  }

  /* Rotating tagline */
  .rotating-wrapper {
    height: 2rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    animation: heroFadeIn 1s ease-out 0.6s both;
  }

  .rotating-text {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    animation: rotateWords 9s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  .rotating-text span {
    height: 2rem;
    line-height: 2rem;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #60a5fa;
  }

  @keyframes rotateWords {
    0%, 20% { transform: translateY(0); }
    25%, 45% { transform: translateY(-2rem); }
    50%, 70% { transform: translateY(-4rem); }
    75%, 95% { transform: translateY(-6rem); }
    100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes heroFadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .hero-links a {
    display: inline-block;
    color: #fff;
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
    border-radius: 10px;
    margin: 0 0.4rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    animation: heroFadeIn 1s ease-out 0.8s both;
  }

  .hero-links a:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border-color: #fff;
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }

  /* Stats Section */
  .stats-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 2rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding: 3rem 2rem;
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .stat-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 1.8rem 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    min-width: 180px;
    flex: 1;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.08);
    border-top: 4px solid #dbeafe;
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
    animation: heroFadeIn 0.8s ease-out both;
  }

  .stat-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
  .stat-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
  .stat-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
  .stat-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.8s; }

  .stat-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.15);
    border-top: 4px solid #1a56db;
  }

  .stat-number {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #1a56db;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #64748b;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  /* About Section */
  .about-section {
    max-width: 800px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 2rem 2rem 3rem;
  }

  .about-section h2 {
    color: #1a56db;
    font-weight: 700;
    border-bottom: 3px solid #dbeafe;
    padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }

  /* Skills visualization */
  .skills-viz {
    max-width: 800px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 2rem 3rem;
  }

  .skill-bar-wrapper {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .skill-bar-label {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #1e293b;
  }

  .skill-bar-bg {
    background: #dbeafe;
    border-radius: 10px;
    height: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .skill-bar-fill {
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0c2d6b, #1a56db, #3b82f6);
    width: 0%;
    transition: width 1.5s ease-out;
  }

  /* Interests pills */
  .interest-pills {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }

  .interest-pill {
    background: #dbeafe;
    color: #1e40af;
    padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
    border-radius: 25px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .interest-pill:hover {
    background: #1a56db;
    color: #fff;
    transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05);
  }

  .interest-pill .emoji {
    margin-right: 0.3rem;
  }
</style>

<!-- Hero Section -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <img src="profile_pic.jpg" alt="Shivang Bhatt" class="hero-img">
    <h1>Shivang Bhatt</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">M.S. Business Analytics @ UC San Diego (Rady)</p>
    <div class="rotating-wrapper">
      <div class="rotating-text">
        <span>📊 BI & Revenue Analytics</span>
        <span>⚽ Soccer Fanatic</span>
        <span>🤖 Machine Learning Explorer</span>
        <span>🌅 Sunset Chaser</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-links">
      <a href="mailto:s1bhatt@ucsd.edu">✉ Email</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivang-bhatt-data" target="_blank">in LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://x.com/swwangg" target="_blank">𝕏 Twitter</a>
      <a href="resume.html">📄 Resume</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Stats Section -->
<div class="stats-section">
  <div class="stat-card">
    <span class="stat-number" id="stat-years">0</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Years Experience</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <span class="stat-number" id="stat-projects">0</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Projects Delivered</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <span class="stat-number" id="stat-tools">0</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Tools & Technologies</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <span class="stat-number" id="stat-roi">0%</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Best Campaign ROI Lift</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Skills Visualization -->
<div class="skills-viz">
  <h2 style="color: #1a56db; border-bottom: 3px solid #dbeafe; padding-bottom: 0.4rem;">Skills</h2>

  <div class="skill-bar-wrapper">
    <div class="skill-bar-label"><span>SQL & Snowflake</span><span>95%</span></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="95"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-bar-wrapper">
    <div class="skill-bar-label"><span>Python (Pandas, NumPy, Seaborn)</span><span>90%</span></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="90"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-bar-wrapper">
    <div class="skill-bar-label"><span>Tableau & Power BI</span><span>92%</span></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="92"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-bar-wrapper">
    <div class="skill-bar-label"><span>AWS (S3, Redshift, Glue)</span><span>80%</span></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="80"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-bar-wrapper">
    <div class="skill-bar-label"><span>Machine Learning (XGBoost, RF)</span><span>82%</span></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="82"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-bar-wrapper">
    <div class="skill-bar-label"><span>Salesforce & HubSpot</span><span>88%</span></div>
    <div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" data-width="88"></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- About Section -->
<div class="about-section">
  <h2>About Me</h2>
  <p>Hi! I'm Shivang — a Business Analytics graduate student at UC San Diego's Rady School of Management. I specialize in business intelligence, revenue analytics, and building data-driven solutions for enterprise clients.</p>
  <p>When I'm not crunching numbers, you'll find me watching soccer, chasing sunsets, or debating who's winning the next World Cup.</p>

  <h2>Interests</h2>
  <div class="interest-pills">
    <span class="interest-pill"><span class="emoji">⚽</span>Soccer</span>
    <span class="interest-pill"><span class="emoji">🌅</span>Sunsets</span>
    <span class="interest-pill"><span class="emoji">📊</span>GTM Strategy</span>
    <span class="interest-pill"><span class="emoji">🤖</span>Machine Learning</span>
    <span class="interest-pill"><span class="emoji">📈</span>Revenue Analytics</span>
    <span class="interest-pill"><span class="emoji">🏆</span>Sports Analytics</span>
    <span class="interest-pill"><span class="emoji">☁️</span>Cloud & Data Engineering</span>
  </div>

  <h2>Education</h2>
  <p><strong>University of California, San Diego</strong> | M.S. in Business Analytics (Rady Scholar) | Dec 2026</p>
  <p><strong>Wilson College, University of Mumbai</strong> | B.S. in Management Studies (Business Statistics) | Oct 2020</p>
</div>

<!-- Animated Counter Script -->
<script>
function animateCounter(id, target, suffix = '') {
  let current = 0;
  const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(target / 60));
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  const interval = setInterval(() => {
    current += step;
    if (current >= target) {
      current = target;
      clearInterval(interval);
    }
    el.textContent = current + suffix;
  }, 30);
}

// Trigger counters when stats section is visible
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      animateCounter('stat-years', 4, '+');
      animateCounter('stat-projects', 10, '+');
      animateCounter('stat-tools', 15, '+');
      animateCounter('stat-roi', 20);
      observer.disconnect();
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.3 });

observer.observe(document.querySelector('.stats-section'));

// Animate skill bars on scroll
const skillObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.skill-bar-fill').forEach(bar => {
        bar.style.width = bar.dataset.width + '%';
      });
      skillObserver.disconnect();
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.3 });

skillObserver.observe(document.querySelector('.skills-viz'));
</script>
```
